issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

The issue persists after multiple updates, which is why I am submitting this error report. ### Screenshots

I tried disabling each of the four protections individually — ad blocking, tracking protection, DNS protection, and the firewall — and also turned them all off at the same time, but the internet remains unavailable whenever AdGuard is turned on. This affects not only Chrome but also messaging apps, which are unable to send messages due to the loss of internet connection. comment.body:
The orignal rule is kinda wide, so that's why I suggested this one. Another option without `:contains`.
```suggestion
transtxxx.com##.video-content > div[class] > div:has(> div.pplayer) + div[class]
```

comment.body:
I don't see that popup, but looks something similar to https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/218893 Test adding
```
news.web.nhk#%#//scriptlet('trusted-set-cookie', 'consentToUse', '{"status":"optedin","entity":"household","area":{"areaId":"130","jisx0402":"13113","postal":"1508001","pref":"13"}}')
news.web.nhk#%#//scriptlet('trusted-set-cookie', 'efm', '{"sd":"2025-10-01T00:00:00.000Z","ed":"2050-12-31T23:59:59.999Z"}')
```

to User rules. If they don't work, please share more details to reproduce.

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

The same appears to be the case for every subsidiary of Advance Publications (nj.com, syracuse.com, cleveland.com, masslive.com, etc.). ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8oqzg9g0d2ww040w4gowwo0osksgog4cqvfqzlj8bw.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.6 System version: | `Windows 11, version 25H2` Browser: | Firefox Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
Legitimate URL Shortener

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
Adblock Warning Removal List

**Security:**
Online Malicious URL Blocklist

**Other:**
AdGuard Experimental filter,
AdGuard DNS filter AdGuard driver: | WFP Tracking protection: | disabled DNS filtering: | server: `Cloudflare`
filters: `AdGuard DNS Filter` Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Assistant`
`AdGuard Extra`
`AdGuard Popup Blocker` Userstyles: | disabled Other extensions used: | `Bypass Paywalls Clean, Bitwarden, Checker Plus for Gmail, Dark Reader, Microsoft Defender` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=win&product_version=7.22.6&system_version=Windows+11%2C+version+25H2&browser=firefox&filters=2.3.251.4.14.19.20.21.207.5.208.15&dns_servers=Cloudflare&userscripts=AdGuard+Assistant%0AAdGuard+Extra%0AAdGuard+Popup+Blocker&dns.filters=AdGuard+DNS+Filter&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&win.wfp=true)

Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/hh233pco01wgs0wgc0ooskc08w88k8gqkdogx6jkdc.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Mac v2.18.0.2089 release System version: | `MacOS 26.4 (Build 25E246)` Browser: | Safari Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

AdGuard URL Tracking filter,
EasyPrivacy

AdGuard Social Media filter

**Annoyances:**

AdGuard Popups filter,

AdGuard Widgets filter,
Adblock Warning Removal List

Block trackers,

Protect against DPI DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Popup Blocker (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/popup-blocker/2.5/popupblocker.user.js)`
`AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled Other extensions used: | `Bitdefender, 1Password` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=mac&product_version=2.18.0.2089+release&system_version=MacOS+26.4+%28Build+25E246%29&browser=safari&filters=2.3.4.17.18.19.21.22.118.207.208&custom_filters=adBlockWhitelist.php+%28url%3A+https%3A%2F%2Fshopping.mileageplus.com%2FadBlockWhitelist.php%29%2CAdGuard+Annoyances+filter+%28url%3A+https%3A%2F%2Ffilters.adtidy.org%2Fmac_v2%2Ffilters%2F14.txt%29&dns_servers=System&userscripts=AdGuard+Popup+Blocker+%28url%3A+https%3A%2F%2Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%2Frelease%2Fpopup-blocker%2F2.5%2Fpopupblocker.user.js%29%2C%0AAdGuard+Extra+%28url%3A+https%3A%2F%2Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%2Frelease%2Fadguard-extra%2F1.0%2Fadguard-extra.user.js%29&dns.filters=AdGuard+DNS+filter&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=false&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.java=true&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=true&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&referrer=&scheme_version=3&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=2000)
